title: Docs Viewer Management Script Overview
content_html:
Docs Viewer Management Script Overview

This is the ownership map for the scripts and service modules behind Docs Viewer management. Endpoint behavior is documented separately in Endpoint Overview.

Runtime And Dispatch

  • Service Entrypoints: docs-viewer/bin/docs-viewer, docs-viewer/services/docs_viewer_service.py
  • Route Dispatch Scripts: docs_management_routes.py, docs_management_service.py, docs_management_context.py

Read And Config Helpers

  • Read And Config Scripts: generated reads, capabilities, source-config report, source-config settings, and source model helpers

Write Workflows

  • Source Mutation Scripts: create, metadata, viewability, move, delete, and scope lifecycle apply helpers
  • Import Scripts: staged source import service and format conversion helpers
  • Source Editor Scripts: source body read/rebuild and local editor open helpers
  • Rebuild Follow-Through Scripts: builder command orchestration and live-watcher suppression helpers
  • Audit Scripts: broken-link route adapter and CLI audit engine

Ownership Rule

Endpoint modules should parse and dispatch HTTP-shaped input. Workflow modules should own validation, planning, source writes, generated-output rebuilds, and activity/log side effects. Builders should own generated artifact formats.
